name: Hexarelin
subtitle: Examorelin | Synthetic Growth Hormone Secretagogue
overview: Hexarelin is one of the most potent synthetic growth hormone secretagogues available. It stimulates GH release by binding to the GHS-R1a receptor in the pituitary and hypothalamus, mimicking the action of ghrelin. Notably, Hexarelin demonstrates synergistic effects when combined with GHRH, producing GH responses greater than the arithmetic sum of either peptide alone. It also shows unique cardioprotective properties mediated through the CD36 receptor.
mechanism: Hexarelin binds to the growth hormone secretagogue receptor 1a (GHS-R1a) in the brain and pituitary gland. This binding initiates a signaling cascade that stimulates somatotroph cells in the anterior pituitary to produce and release growth hormone. Hexarelin also has slight, dose-dependent effects on prolactin, ACTH, and cortisol release. Its cardioprotective effects are mediated through CD36 receptor activation and modulation of calcium channels in cardiomyocytes.
keyBenefits: Most potent GHRP for GH stimulation

items.name: GH Secretion
items.description: Most potent GHRP for stimulating endogenous growth hormone release from the pituitary.

items.name: Synergy with GHRH
items.description: Produces synergistic GH release when combined with GHRH, greater than sum of individual effects.

items.name: IGF-1 Elevation
items.description: Significant increases in IGF-1 levels through enhanced GH secretion.

items.name: Cardioprotection
items.description: Protective effects on cardiac tissue mediated through CD36 receptor activation.

items.name: Cardiomyocyte Protection
items.description: Reduces apoptosis of cardiomyocytes and controls cardiac action potential.

items.name: Calcium Channel Modulation
items.description: Cardiotropic effects mediated by elevation of Ca2+ influx through voltage-gated calcium channels.

items.name: Fat Metabolism
items.description: Beneficial effects on lipid metabolism via CD36 receptor in non-obese insulin-resistant models.

items.name: Body Composition
items.description: Improved lean mass to fat ratio through GH and IGF-1 elevation.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous or intramuscular injection. Hexarelin is rapidly absorbed after subcutaneous administration and demonstrates stability against proteolytic enzymes. Best administered on empty stomach.

steps: Clean work area and hands thoroughly
Inject slowly down vial side (not directly onto powder)
Store in refrigerator, use within 28 days

keyBenefits: Administer on empty stomach for best GH release
Can combine with GHRH for synergistic effects

interactions.notes: Powerful synergy; combination produces GH response greater than sum of individual effects.
Research confirms synergistic GH release when co-administered.
Similar mechanism; typically not stacked together but can be alternated.
Same receptor target; Hexarelin is more potent with less appetite stimulation.
Both are GHRPs; Hexarelin is more potent but may have more side effects.

timeline.effects: GH spike within 15-30 minutes of injection
Maximum benefits; consider cycling to prevent desensitization

contraindications: Active cancer or history of cancer
monitoring: May cause receptor desensitization with prolonged use
Consider cycling (8-12 weeks on, 4 weeks off)

references.title: Hexarelin Improves Lipid Metabolic Aberrations in Insulin-Resistant Mice
references.keyFindings: Hexarelin treatment improved lipid metabolism via CD36 receptor in non-obese insulin-resistant MKR mice.

references.title: Effect of Repeated Hexarelin Administration on GH Responsivity
references.keyFindings: Demonstrated synergistic GH response when hexarelin co-administered with GHRH, greater than arithmetic sum.

references.title: Hexarelin Modulates GHS-R1a Expression
references.keyFindings: Hexarelin significantly increased pituitary and hypothalamic GHS-R1a mRNA levels.

references.title: Kinetics and Disposition of Hexarelin in Rats
references.keyFindings: Half-life of 75.9 min; rapidly absorbed subcutaneously; stable against proteolytic enzymes.

quickStats.frequency: 2-3 times daily for optimal GH pulses
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: Room temperature. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 28 days
